name: Spam Cheesy Broccoli Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed - (12 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cook broccoli until just tender and drain well.
3. Mix together soup and sour cream. Add broccoli, SPAM, and rice to the mixture.
4. Pour into a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle with bread crumbs.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until heated through.
